programme.title: Don't Hate Your House With the Property Brothers
programme.desc: After years of urging, Jonathan and Drew finally convinced their parents to relocate to Los Angeles; though they're too sweet to complain, they're overdue a home of their own and stalled timelines and delays have them shuffling between guest spaces.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Don't Hate Your House With the Property Brothers
programme.desc: Drew and Jonathan face a tough challenge with the L.A. house they bought for their parents, Jim and Joanne; nearly a year in, guilt and anxiety riddle them because project delays stretch on.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Don't Hate Your House With the Property Brothers
programme.desc: After moving over six times in a dozen years, Carolyn and her daughters Tuki and Ruby find a house in a great neighborhood, but it has a problem - it only has two bedrooms.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Don't Hate Your House With the Property Brothers
programme.desc: To move into their dream neighbourhood, Chanel and Jeff buy a house no one wants; the discovery of water damage threatens to derail the renovation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Don't Hate Your House With the Property Brothers
programme.desc: Joon and Younga buy a starter home with the goal of moving when their kids get older; now they've convinced Joon's parents to move into the neighbourhood to be near the grandkids, so they stay put and need to renovate.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Don't Hate Your House With the Property Brothers
programme.desc: Herme and Angie both work from home and living in a house that wasn't built with separated work spaces is taking its toll; Drew and Jonathan try to reconfigure the home's layout into a live-work space, while staying on budget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Heather and Ian are hanging on by a thread: with two kids under three who don't sleep, and the end of maternity leave around the corner, they are exhausted and living in a constant state of anxiety and frustration; they're so overrun with clutter that their deep soaker tub has become storage; Kortney and Kenny rescue the pair by creating child-safe storage solutions, a custom kitchen pantry to get organized, and a revamped basement with a tub used for baths, not storage.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: After moving into their three-bedroom forever home, Catherine and Rob found out they were pregnant again and immediately felt the squeeze; managing three kids, two large dogs, and nightly musical beds, exhaustion has taken over and their home has descended into total chaos; Kortney and Kenny devise solutions with the grown-ups and the kids to bring back the beauty and the calm, so their house can stay their forever home.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Shanelle is tired of feeling like a teenager. As a single mom living temporarily in her father's home, she and her son Elijah are feeling boxed in. Their footprint is limited to three bedrooms, including one for her home business, but they are all bursting at the seams with years of clutter, clothing and nail tech gear. Kortney and Kenny reimagine the life they could live, creating two beautiful bedrooms and a stunning nail salon that will get business booming.

programme.title: The Block Australia
programme.desc: Teams compete to see who can renovate houses on Phillip Island for the most profit, as the properties are placed on auction soon after refurbishments are completed.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Two British families set up shop in Spain to sell property to Britain families looking for a bit of fun in the sun.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Finally in San Jose del Cabo, Mexico, After All These Years
programme.desc: After spending half of their 20-year marriage living apart, a couple leave their hectic jobs and move to San Jose del Cabo, Mexico; now with less income, he wants her to give up the vacation-style ocean view she prefers for a budget-conscious life.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Block Australia
programme.desc: Teams compete to see who can renovate houses on Phillip Island for the most profit, as the properties are placed on auction soon after refurbishments are completed.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Peter gets stuck in the mud; Beat helps Sam with his biggest build ever, but a reckless crane operator threatens the entire project.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Beat creates a country retreat for a demanding French financier; Joel's Australian client makes a last minute request for a three-car garage; Peter plans a surprise for Andre's 50th birthday.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Peter builds a duck-hunting cabin in Newfoundland; Bryan Jr. renovates the patio at a local pub.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: A challenging modern log home has Beat and his crew risking life and limb; Joel and Bryan Sr. hire an eccentric perfectionist to carve a statue on a tight deadline.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Joel is under the gun at a job in California that is behind schedule before it even begins; the crew works to finish a huge project that is on the verge of shipping out.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Bryan Jr. makes a mark in the self-proclaimed log home capital of the world; when Peter's creativity goes into overdrive, Andre attempts to control him.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Lara Spencer tasks two teams to design functional and fashionable studio apartments going bold with color saturation vs. patterns; the teams struggle to source in the wild and get clever to create memorable multipurpose makeovers.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Two teams are put to the test to thrift Gothic Luxe vs. Park Avenue pieces to create the primary bedrooms of our dreams; while finding a bed turns out to be a nightmare, the duos deliver wow-worthy designs.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Challenging two design teams to transform a den in a Hamptons Coastal vs. Cowboy Chic showdown; there are no limits to their sourcing and their creativity as they hit up the dump and even include live fish in their designs.

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: A historic Victorian home needs an update.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: Police officers cannot agree on whether to update or relocate.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: A suburban home to accommodate a multi-generational family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: Sarah and Andrew need a bigger house.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Sit back for an epic lounge showdown. Lara Spencer tasks two teams to create bold, beautiful, and budget-friendly spaces in a Mid-Century vs. Modern Farmhouse faceoff. Unreal finds plus DIY designs mean must-see floor to ceiling lounges.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Lara Spencer challenges two teams to thrift and transform a home office, pitting Palm Springs retro against Palm Beach prep. The two design families flex their haggling and out-of-the-box design solutions to create the office 2.0.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Mel and Roy have lost control of their home; their creative and energetic kids have turned the entire main floor into an art explosion that knows no boundaries; even the walls have turned into a kiddie canvas; feeling embarrassed and overwhelmed, no amount of effort seems to help; Kortney and Kenny sharpen their focus to create some order: a dedicated space for art, a reorganized kitchen, a tranquil room for adulting, and a proper dining room is finally born.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Lara Spencer challenges two teams to thrift and transform a space into a swanky speakeasy, pitting Moroccan flair against Art Deco glamour as they hunt for standout pieces and reimagine secondhand finds into dramatic, high-style designs.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Lara Spencer doles out a dining room challenge in an English Cottage vs. Modern Glam faceoff. From travertine to bold stripes, they race to create high-end spaces in just two days--each with a very different vision.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Mel and Roy have lost control of their home; their creative and energetic kids have turned the entire main floor into an art explosion that knows no boundaries; even the walls have turned into a kiddie canvas; feeling embarrassed and overwhelmed, no amount of effort seems to help; Kortney and Kenny sharpen their focus to create some order: a dedicated space for art, a reorganized kitchen, a tranquil room for adulting, and a proper dining room is finally born.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Lara Spencer challenges two teams to thrift and transform a space into a swanky speakeasy, pitting Moroccan flair against Art Deco glamour as they hunt for standout pieces and reimagine secondhand finds into dramatic, high-style designs.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Lara Spencer tasks two teams to design functional and fashionable studio apartments going bold with color saturation vs. patterns; the teams struggle to source in the wild and get clever to create memorable multipurpose makeovers.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Two teams are put to the test to thrift Gothic Luxe vs. Park Avenue pieces to create the primary bedrooms of our dreams; while finding a bed turns out to be a nightmare, the duos deliver wow-worthy designs.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Ken and Elisa hired a contractor to help renovate their home, but the contractor abandoned them in the middle of the project.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: A fun-loving family is tired of their home's cramped layout and galley-style kitchen.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Sebastian and Sabrina work to transform Kim and Kyle's 100-year-old home, using up-cycled materials and imaginative design.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: With unfinished renovations and raccoons in the chimney, Phil and Jenn are getting desperate; it is up to Sabrina to keep Phil's expensive taste in check, while Sebastian works with Jenn to get this renovation on budget and ready in time for winter.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Elise and former DJ Michael are new parents living in a home of half-finished DIYs, where Mike's renovation attempts have resulted in no ceiling and a kitchen that doubles as a laundry room.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Board game enthusiasts with two young children and an unfinished basement that hasn't been used since they moved in hope to transform the drab space into both a family area and a gamer's paradise.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Charlotte wants to overhaul her outdated kitchen, but this job is too big for one woman.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Erin and Richard have three young kids and an outdated `70s split-level that needs some love; there is a fireplace hazard and many half-finished projects.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Ashlea and Graeme would like to convert their cozy barn into a functional space for exercise, leisure, and work, but they are being told to tear it all down and start from scratch.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: A couple looks to renovate their kitchen in the home they love.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Professional makeup artist Maria needs her 80s-style bathroom to be a space she can work in.

programme.title: Save My Reno
programme.desc: Professional hockey player Natalie dreams of having her own personal gym.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Moving for Maori Culture in Hamilton, New Zealand
programme.desc: Influenced by Maori culture, a Ph.D. from New Jersey and his chef husband relocate to New Zealand; they look to reset in the small town of Hamilton.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: A Long List of Firsts in Maastricht, the Netherlands
programme.desc: Fueled by visions of a fairy-tale life together, a young Canadian couple is ready to embrace adulthood in Maastricht, the Netherlands; they're facing a daunting list of firsts, and as reality sets in, enduring their first disagreement is a challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A London woman gets her dream promotion and looks to move her family abroad to Eindhoven, Netherlands; they intend to live large in their new city, but with three kids and her husband's career in flux, they may have to temper their big expectations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Returning to Auckland, New Zealand as a Family Man
programme.desc: After being away for two decades, a California man looks to return with his family to Auckland, New Zealand; he hopes to stay permanently, but to win the whole family over, they'll need to find a spacious home that's close to their children's school.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Say It Ain't Snow in the Bellarine Peninsula
programme.desc: An Ohio family is ready to leave behind the cold for Australia's sunny Bellarine Peninsula; they're on the hunt for an affordable beachside home to ease their kids' transition without straining their budget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
